summary.intent: Fix PR review comments on a GitHub Copilot enterprise provider, addressing security vulnerabilities and logic bugs.
summary.outcome: SSRF protection was extended to block IP address patterns in proxy endpoints, committed and all 32 tests passing.

repo: The GitHub Copilot provider is in crates/providers/src/github_copilot.rs within a Rust workspace
SSRF protection for proxy_ep uses character allowlist validation in copilot_auth_from_parts
CopilotAuth.token uses Secret<String> type for secure token handling
needs_responses_api() guard must run before is_enterprise check in complete() for correct API routing

code.finding: copilot_auth_from_parts validates proxy_ep with [a-zA-Z0-9.-] allowlist to prevent SSRF; IP address patterns were added as an additional test case in a follow-up commit

workflow: PR review comments were fetched via Bash before making fixes, ensuring all feedback was captured
Tests were run after each fix cycle to verify no regressions before committing

friction: Multiple rounds of PR comments required — initial security fixes were followed by an additional IP address SSRF gap caught in review
